name: Estoque e Farmácia — visualizar itens e estoque

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with testesprite@gmail.com / testesprite123
Click on the 'Estoque e Farmácia' module card (id: 7)
The Pharmacy module page is displayed with a list of medication items
Click on a medication item to view details
The item details show lot numbers, expiry dates, and current stock quantity
